issue: exported component with no permission protection

details.reason: Exported activity 'com.facebook.CustomTabActivity' requires no permission — any third-party app can invoke it directly.

issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

details.reason: Activity 'com.facebook.CustomTabActivity' is reachable from other apps and handles sensitive system intent actions. Verify that all incoming Intent data is validated before use.

Service 'com.chownow.utils.pushNotification.FirebasePushNotification' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.facebook.CustomTabActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'fbconnect://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
